subject: docs: add Expo SDK upgrade to USER_ACTIONS for build exit warning
body:
The "Something prevented Expo from exiting" message is a known
Expo SDK 54 / CLI issue where Metro holds an open handle after
export. Build output is correct — cosmetic only. Document the
upgrade steps for when the next SDK is available.

Tags: documentation, expo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: maintenance
Semver: patch

title: add Expo SDK upgrade to USER_ACTIONS for build exit warning
